titleStmt.title: SII 10.269: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 269. (A.R. No. 140 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR OF THE MADHYARANGA, IN THE TEMPLE OF DANTĒŚVARA, PRATTIPĀḌU, GUNTUR TALUK GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1144.

summary.p: States that Parichchhēda Kusmarāju established the image of Gaṇḍēśvara and endowed it with two martus of land for the merit of his wife Sabbamadēvi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1144 gu nēṁṭṭicai
traśuddadaśamiyu sōmavāramunāṁḍu

svasti samadhigatapaṁccamahāśa
bda mahāmaṇḍalēśvara ripupuratri
puramāhēśvara virajāpurīpura
na rēśvara du[¨r]jayakulakulācala
mrigēṁdra satyahariścaṁdra kriṣṇavē
ṇyānadīdakṣiṇaśaṭusahaśragrāmāvanī
vallabha vīramahēśvara kollipākāpuravarēśvara
mallikāvallabha canupakāmōdakuṁtakāṁttēya
kubjikāmitravīramukhada¨rppaṇa vibudha
saṁtta¨rppaṇa vīramurāri dīnakānīna vidyādha
ra bhōgapuraṁdara patimeccugaṇḍa patihi
tācaraṇa cōḍakaṭakavajraprākāra raṭṭakaṭa
karakṣapālaka cālukyarājyamaṁdiramū

lastaṁbha vijayalakṣmīpariraṁbbhaṇōtsuku
laina śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara paricchēda
kusmarājulu gaṁḍḍīśvaraśrīmahādēva
ra pratiṣṭa sēsi tama kulapatni yaina sa
bbamadēvulaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugānu nera
ḷaceṟvu venaka ma¨rtu 1 Ēnuṁguceṟvu
venaka ma¨rttu 1 nivēdyāna kistimi svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁddharā śaṣṭi
¨rvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi
Digital edition of SII 10.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
